question.question: He was offered a scholarship {a1} his academic record was exceptional.

source.name: Conjunctions — and, but, or, because, so

variants.text: He was offered a scholarship {a1} his academic record was exceptional.

hints.hint: Use 'because' when an exceptional record is the stated basis for a scholarship.

Użyj 'because', gdy wyjątkowe wyniki są podstawą stypendium.
Стипендія `was offered a scholarship` — рішення, а `academic record was exceptional` — об'єктивна підстава.

Сполучник because пояснює офіційну причину або підставу для надання стипендії.
Стипендія `was offered a scholarship` — рішення, а `academic record was exceptional` — об'єктивна підстава.

chatgpt_explanations.question: He was offered a scholarship {a1} his academic record was exceptional.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: Incorrect. 'And' does not show that the academic record is the reason for the scholarship.

chatgpt_explanations.question: He was offered a scholarship {a1} his academic record was exceptional.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: Niepoprawnie. «And» nie wskazuje, że wyniki były powodem przyznania stypendium.

chatgpt_explanations.question: He was offered a scholarship {a1} his academic record was exceptional.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: «and» просто з'єднав би факти без демонстрації того, що висока успішність є причиною стипендії.

chatgpt_explanations.question: He was offered a scholarship {a1} his academic record was exceptional.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: «and» просто з'єднав би факти без демонстрації того, що висока успішність є причиною стипендії.

chatgpt_explanations.question: He was offered a scholarship {a1} his academic record was exceptional.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: Correct. 'Because' links the scholarship offer to its specific justification: exceptional record.

chatgpt_explanations.question: He was offered a scholarship {a1} his academic record was exceptional.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: Poprawnie. «Because» łączy ofertę stypendium z jego konkretnym uzasadnieniem: wyjątkowe wyniki.

chatgpt_explanations.question: He was offered a scholarship {a1} his academic record was exceptional.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: «because» правильний: він пов'язує рішення про стипендію з конкретним академічним досягненням.

chatgpt_explanations.question: He was offered a scholarship {a1} his academic record was exceptional.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: «because» правильний: він пов'язує рішення про стипендію з конкретним академічним досягненням.

chatgpt_explanations.question: He was offered a scholarship {a1} his academic record was exceptional.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: Incorrect. 'So' would imply being offered a scholarship caused the exceptional record — the wrong order.

chatgpt_explanations.question: He was offered a scholarship {a1} his academic record was exceptional.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: Niepoprawnie. «So» sugerowałoby, że oferta stypendium spowodowała wyjątkowe wyniki — zła kolejność.

chatgpt_explanations.question: He was offered a scholarship {a1} his academic record was exceptional.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: «so» вводив би результат: 'йому запропонували стипендію, тому його успішність була виключною' — це нелогічно.

chatgpt_explanations.question: He was offered a scholarship {a1} his academic record was exceptional.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: «so» вводив би результат: 'йому запропонували стипендію, тому його успішність була виключною' — це нелогічно.
